output.summary: 11-layer Int5-fit model pairs XSA/EMA/pruning with muon optimizer tweaks and compliant chunked eval-then-train test-time adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Causal TTT sequentially trains on each validation chunk after scoring it, so the adaptation happens solely on validation data.
techniques: Chunked eval-then-train causal TTT over 64 validation chunks
Int5-All quantization plus EMA and adaptive pruning to stay under 16MB
XSA on final layers with muon optimizer and SmearGate-initialized weights
